mentions.note: Phenomenal post-quarter rally continuing (+7% today) after genuine conversion from enterprise software to AI data company; analyst day Tuesday; CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy conversion story compelling.

Successful pivot from software to AI-enabled hybrid platform with Anthropic, OpenAI partnerships; $6B Amazon Web Services commitment signals market leadership; 36% single-day surge proves AI displacement fears overblown.

Q1 EPS beat (+33% revenue YoY), NRR 126%, Cortex Code GA with 7,100+ users, Snowflake Intelligence users doubled QoQ. $6B AWS deal, OpenAI/Anthropic partnerships. Natoma acquisition enables 'control plane' for enterprise agents. FY27 guidance raised 27%→31% growth.
CEO Frank Slootman performing well; first decent price in long time; despite Databricks disruption fears, buy here—overcomplicated narrative.
Enterprise data platform; Cramer watching earnings closely to see how market reacts to AI disruption thesis; may become too cheap if earnings hold.
Enterprise software weakness dragging Adobe, Salesforce, ServiceNow; Cramer won't call bottom here due to poor charts.
Up 42% in 2025 (solid); IPO at $70B valuation in Sept 2020, now ~$80B; DataBricks comparable but potentially priced more rationally.
Strong earnings quarter, analyst upgrades, CEO Shriar Raaswami presentation; stock collapsed but stabilizing; highly valued but terrific CEO makes this a buy per Robert's Hawaii caller question.
